name: luly-v0-2-9
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.9: (1) image-first mobile default — `image-richtext` blocks always emit `imagePositionMobile: top` unless the screen explicitly overrides via `mobile: bottom`. Desktop `position: left|right` decoupled from mobile order. (2) Brand research persistence — luly-intake now codifies Tier 1 (homepage + brand pages + favicon chain + PWA manifest), Tier 2 (brand.fetch, Google cache, Wayback, GitHub, npm), Tier 3 (search + social) escalation ladder. Required `## Brand research log` section with ≥6 attempts before `default-luly` is allowed. (3) Favicon as course-icon fallback — when no clean press-kit icon exists, the brand's favicon (PNG or SVG) lands as the course iconSvg/iconUrl. PNG support added to assemble: `brand-icon.png` becomes `course.body.iconUrl` data URI.
